_comment: MrFoX-MeM hook wiring (macOS/Linux). Copy the "hooks" block into your .claude/settings.json (project-level: <project>/.claude/settings.json, or user-level: ~/.claude/settings.json). ADJUST the absolute paths below to where MrFoX-MeM lives on your machine. Windows users: use hooks/settings.snippet.windows.json instead (interpreter is 'python', not 'python3'). Set MRFOX_API and MRFOX_PROJECT in your env (see .env.example). Hooks fail open: if the core API is down they exit 0 silently and never block the session.
